steps.title: Find the actual effect on populations
steps.content: The key clue is the explanation after “but”: the harvesting method “allows new sweetgrass plants to repopulate the space, with an overall increase in number and vigor.” This describes the actual outcome the blank must express.

steps.title: Match the outcome to the best word
steps.content: “Replenishes” means to restore or rebuild a supply—precisely matching how the method increases plant numbers and vigor. The other three either misname the function or fail to convey restoration. That confirms D is correct.
